zh.Lutterell Manor, Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾胡頓 帕格爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jennet de Luttrell於1150年出生在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾胡頓 帕格爾時，她的父親Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell16歲，母親Margaret Pine16歲。她於大約1167年與Lord John de Calverley在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1227年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jennet de Luttrell于1150年出生在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾胡頓 帕格爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell16岁，母亲Margaret Pine16岁。她于大约1167年与Lord John de Calverley在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1227年在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Jennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Jeannette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jennet de Luttrell was born in 1150, in Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell, was 16 and her mother, Margaret Pine, was 16. She married Lord John de Calverley about 1167, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1227, in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England: Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jennet de Luttrell est née en 1150, à Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pine, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John de Calverley environ 1167, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1227, à Calverley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jennet de Luttrell è nata il nel 1150 nel Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Margaret Pine, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Lord John de Calverley circa 1167, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jennet de Luttrellが1150年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアホーオトン プアグネルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnellは16歳，母Margaret Pineは16歳であった。約1167年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでLord John de Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1227年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで77歳で死去した。

ko.Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jennet de Luttrell(이)가 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Pine(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Lord John de Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jennet de Luttrell nasceu em 1150, em Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pine, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John de Calverley aproximadamente 1167, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1227, em Calverley, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England: хутон пагнелл, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jennet de Luttrell родилась в 1150 г. в местности хутон пагнелл, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pine, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John de Calverley около 1167 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1227 г. в местности калвирли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
